name: Lesson Planning
description: Generates inquiry-driven lesson plans for high school chemistry and physics courses.

inputs.name: topic
inputs.description: The subject or concept for the lesson.

inputs.name: duration
inputs.description: Class period length or number of periods.

inputs.name: objectives
inputs.description: Specific learning objectives for this lesson.

inputs.name: priorKnowledge
inputs.description: What students already know coming into this lesson.

outputs.name: lessonPlan
outputs.description: Complete lesson plan with warm-up, investigation, reflection, and assessment.
